headline: Recovery verified and completed Session 47: every audit item shipped, innovation followed through, and the final tree is test- and doctor-green.

items.title: truthful-protocol-renderers
items.evidence: Audit Markdown is generated from canonical JSON and startup claims now preserve verified truth.

items.title: franchise-intelligence-surfaces
items.evidence: Priority Inbox persistence is franchise-scoped and Tactical Film Room receipts connect preparation to outcomes.

items.title: executable-gm-commitments
items.evidence: General Manager choices execute immediately or create falsifiable commitments whose resolutions affect franchise state.

items.title: checkpoint-aware-fast-sim
items.evidence: Fast Sim pauses on source-derived decisions, phase boundaries, playoff stakes, and commitment resolutions with a visible digest.

items.title: runtime-switch-save-guard
items.evidence: Runtime switching clears and locks stale save rows before asynchronous reload, eliminating the observed UI race.

followUps.title: email-forwarding-receipt
followUps.evidence: Obtain real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com before any SPARKED flip.

blockers.title: launch/SPARKED
blockers.evidence: Launch remains evidence-gated on verified project-domain email forwarding and current live origin/routing; this does not block development or the main-branch push.

honestyLedger.title: aggregate-test-wrapper
honestyLedger.evidence: The aggregate npm test wrapper was terminated after five silent minutes and was not counted green; every canonical shard passed directly, 337/337.

honestyLedger.title: mislabelled-local-commit
honestyLedger.evidence: An unpushed external commit captured the product implementation under an inaccurate auth message; its message is corrected before push without force.

diffStat.suite: canonical shards 337/337; focused 10/10; Playwright 18/18; Pages build/smoke; doctor blockingFailing 0; genius cache 0 open
